detectors.description: Flags primitive-like values written into _active_models, which breaks the loaded-model registry contract for get_active_model().
Flags object.__setattr__ writes to StageContext validated fields that bypass the assignment-time path-traversal guard.
Flags direct Path(...) construction in guarded API/web contexts unless the usage matches a documented approved safe pattern.
Flags route handlers that call resolve_path() and then pass the raw request object or raw request path fields to downstream calls.
Flags weak lower-bound call_count assertions in tests (>= 1, > 0, 1 <=, 0 <).
